block.header: ugonapar eru kamunusi papuri ra moromoro kikosi myese to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,NP-SBJ,1@侍神主祝部等諸聞食止宣,*

sentence.kanji: 侍神主祝部等諸聞食止宣
sentence.transcription: kamunusi papuri ra moromoro kikosi myese to noru

block.header: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masu sumyemutu kamu rwoki no mikoto kamu rwomi no mikoto motite ama tu yasiro kuni tu yasiro to tatapegoto wope maturu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku kotosi no mina dukwi no tukwi nami no mitegura sipasu pa kotosi sipasu no tukwi nami no mitegura to ipu akaru tape teru tape nigi tape ara tape sonape maturi te asapi no toyosakanobori ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,5@今年乃六月月次幣帛十二月者云今年十二月月次幣帛明,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,NP,12@幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masu

sentence.kanji: 皇睦神漏伎命神漏彌命以
sentence.transcription: sumyemutu kamu rwoki no mikoto kamu rwomi no mikoto motite
ama tu yasiro kuni tu yasiro to
sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 今年乃六月月次幣帛十二月者云今年十二月月次幣帛明
sentence.transcription: kotosi no mina dukwi no tukwi nami no mitegura sipasu pa kotosi sipasu no tukwi nami no mitegura to ipu akaru
tape nigi tape ara tape sonape maturi te

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

block.header: opo mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku kamumusubi takamimusubi ikumusubi tarumusubi tamatumemusubi opomiyanome miketukamwi kotosironusi to mi na pa mawosi te koto wope matura ba sumyemima no mikoto no mi yo wo ta naga no mi yo to kak ipa ni tok ipa ni ipa pi maturi ikasi mi yo ni sakipa pe maturu ga yuwe ni sumyera wa ga mutukamurwoki no mikoto kamurwomi no mikoto to sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@神魂高御魂生魂足魂玉留魂大宮賣御膳都神辭代主止,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,NP,19@幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: opo mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu
sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 神魂高御魂生魂足魂玉留魂大宮賣御膳都神辭代主止
sentence.transcription: kamumusubi takamimusubi ikumusubi tarumusubi tamatumemusubi opomiyanome miketukamwi kotosironusi to
mikoto no mi yo wo ta naga no
tok ipa ni ipa pi maturi

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

block.header: wikasuri no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku ikuwi sakuwi tunagawi asupa papiki to mi na pa mawosi te koto wope maturaba sumyegamwi no siki masu simwo tu ipa ne ni miya basira putwo siri tate takama no para ni ti gwi taka siri te sumyemima no mikoto no midu no mi araka tukape maturi te ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to kakuri masi te yo mo no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku sirosi mye su ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@生井榮井津長井阿須波婆比伎止,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,NP,17@幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: wikasuri no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu
sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 生井榮井津長井阿須波婆比伎止
sentence.transcription: ikuwi sakuwi tunagawi asupa papiki to

sentence.kanji: 下都磐根爾宮柱太知立
sentence.transcription: simwo tu ipa ne ni miya basira putwo siri tate
takama no para ni ti gwi taka siri te

sentence.kanji: 天御蔭日御蔭止隱坐弖
sentence.transcription: ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to kakuri masi te
yo mo no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

block.header: mikadwo no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku kusiipamatwo no mikoto toyoipamatwo no mikoto to mi na pa mawosi te koto wope maturaba yo mo no mi kadwo ni yutu ipa mura no goto ku sayari masi te asita ni pa mi kadwo wo piraki maturi yupubye ni pa mi kadwo wo tate maturi te utwo buru mono no sita ywori yukaba sita wo mamori upe ywori yukaba upe wo mamori ywo no mamori pi no mamori ni mamori maturu ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,7@四方乃御門爾湯都磐村乃如久塞坐弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,NP,20@幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: mikadwo no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu
sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 四方乃御門爾湯都磐村乃如久塞坐弖
sentence.transcription: yo mo no mi kadwo ni yutu ipa mura no goto ku sayari masi te
asita ni pa mi kadwo wo piraki maturi
yupubye ni pa mi kadwo wo tate maturi te
ywo no mamori pi no mamori ni

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

block.header: ikusima no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku ikukuni tarukuni to mi na pa mawosi te koto wope maturaba sumyegamwi no siki masu sima no ya swo sima pa taniguku no sa wataru kipami sipo nawa no todomaru kagiri sa ki kuni pa piro ku sagasi ki kuni pa tapirake ku sima no yaswo sima oturu koto na ku sumyegamwi tati no yosa si maturu ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,NP,19@幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: ikusima no mi kamunagi no koto wope maturu
sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku
ya swo sima pa taniguku no sa wataru
yaswo sima oturu koto na ku
sumyegamwi tati no yosa si maturu ga

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎稱辭竟奉久止宣
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

block.header: koto wakite ise ni masu amaterasu opo mi kamwi no opo mapye ni mawosa ku sumyegamwi no mi paruka si masu yo mo no kuni pa ame no kaki tatu kipami kuni no soki tatu kagiri awo kumwo no tanabiku kipami sirwo kumwo no muka busu kagiri awo mi no para pa sawo kadi posa zu puna no pe no itari todomaru kipami opo mi no para ni pune miti tudukete kuga ywori yuku miti pa ni no wo yupi katame te ipa ne ki ne pumi sakumi te uma no tume no itari todomaru kagiri naga di pima na ku tati tudukete sa ki kuni pa piro ku sagasi ki kuni pa tapirake ku topo ki kuni pa yaswo tuna uti kake te piki yosuru koto no goto ku sumye opo mi kamwi no yosa si matu raba nozaki pa sumye opo mi kamwi no opo mapye ni yokoyama no goto ku uti tumi oki te nokori woba tapirake ku kikosi myesa mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,11@極大海原爾舟滿都〻氣弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,22@國者八十綱打挂弖引寄,*
IP-MAT,24@皇大御神寄悉志奉良八,*
IP-MAT,25@荷前者皇大御神乃前爾如橫山打積置弖,*

sentence.kanji: 天照太御神乃太前爾白久
sentence.transcription: amaterasu opo mi kamwi no opo mapye ni mawosa ku
sumyegamwi no mi paruka si masu
yo mo no kuni pa ame no kaki tatu
kipami sirwo kumwo no muka busu
awo mi no para pa sawo kadi posa zu
puna no pe no itari todomaru

sentence.kanji: 極大海原爾舟滿都〻氣弖
sentence.transcription: kipami opo mi no para ni pune miti tudukete
miti pa ni no wo yupi katame te
ipa ne ki ne pumi sakumi te
uma no tume no itari todomaru
kagiri naga di pima na ku

sentence.kanji: 國者八十綱打挂弖引寄
sentence.transcription: kuni pa yaswo tuna uti kake te piki yosuru

sentence.kanji: 皇大御神寄悉志奉良八
sentence.transcription: sumye opo mi kamwi no yosa si matu raba

sentence.kanji: 荷前者皇大御神乃前爾如橫山打積置弖
sentence.transcription: nozaki pa sumye opo mi kamwi no opo mapye ni yokoyama no goto ku uti tumi oki te
nokori woba tapirake ku kikosi myesa mu

block.header: mata sumyemima no mikoto no mi yo wo ta naga no miyo to kak ipa ni tok ipa ni ipa pi maturi ikasi mi yo ni sakipa pe maturu ga yuwe ni sumyera wa ga mutukamurwoki no mikoto kamurwomi no mikoto to u zimono unane tuki nuki te sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

sentence.transcription: mikoto no mi yo wo ta naga no
tok ipa ni ipa pi maturi
u zimono unane tuki nuki te

block.header: mi agata ni masu sumyegami tati no mapye ni mawosa ku taketi kaduraki towoti siki yamanobe sopu to mi na pa mawosi te ko no mutu no mi agata ni nari iduru ama na kara na wo moti mawi ki te sumyemima no mikoto no naga mi ke no topo mi ke to kikosi myesu ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@高市葛木十市志貴山邊曾布止,*

sentence.transcription: sumyegami tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 高市葛木十市志貴山邊曾布止
sentence.transcription: taketi kaduraki towoti siki yamanobe sopu to
ama na kara na wo moti mawi ki te
mikoto no naga mi ke no

block.header: yama no kuti ni masu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku asuka ipare osaka patuse unebwi miminasi to mi na pa mawosi te topo yama tika yama ni opwi tat eru opo kwi wo gwi wo moto suwe uti kiri te moti mawi ki te sumyemima no mikoto no midu no mi araka tukape maturi te ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to kakuri masi te yo mo no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku sirosi mye su ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@飛鳥石村忍坂長谷畝火耳无止,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,5@大木小木乎本末打切弖持參來弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,9@天御蔭日御蔭止隱坐弖,*

sentence.transcription: sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 飛鳥石村忍坂長谷畝火耳无止
sentence.transcription: asuka ipare osaka patuse unebwi miminasi to
topo yama tika yama ni opwi tat eru

sentence.kanji: 大木小木乎本末打切弖持參來弖
sentence.transcription: opo kwi wo gwi wo moto suwe uti kiri te moti mawi ki te

sentence.kanji: 天御蔭日御蔭止隱坐弖
sentence.transcription: ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to kakuri masi te
yo mo no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku

block.header: mi kumari ni masu sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku yosinwo uda tuge kadurakwi to mi na pa mawosi te koto wope maturaba sumyegamwi tati no yosa si matura mu oki tu mi tosi wo ya tuka po no ikasi po ni yosa si maturaba sumyegamwi tati ni patu po pa kapi ni mo siru ni mo mika no pe taka siri mika no para mite narabe te tatapegoto wope maturi te nokori woba sumyemima no mikoto no asa mi ke yupubye mi ke no kamukapi ni naga mi ke no topo mi ke to akani no po ni kikosi myesu ga yuwe ni sumyemima no mikoto no udu no mitegura wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to moromoro kikosi myese to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ARG,9@皇神等爾初穗者穎爾毛,*

sentence.transcription: sumyegamwi tati no mapye ni mawosa ku
sumyegamwi tati no yosa si matura mu
oki tu mi tosi wo ya tuka po no

sentence.kanji: 皇神等爾初穗者穎爾毛
sentence.transcription: sumyegamwi tati ni patu po pa kapi ni mo
mika no para mite narabe te
mikoto no asa mi ke yupubye mi ke no

block.header: koto wakite imibe no yowa kata ni putwo dasuki tori kake te moti yumapari tukape matur e ru mitegura wo kamunusi papuri ra uke tamapari te koto ayamata zu sasage motite tate mature to noru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@忌部乃弱肩爾大襁取挂弖持由麻波利仕奉禮留,*

sentence.kanji: 忌部乃弱肩爾大襁取挂弖持由麻波利仕奉禮留
sentence.transcription: imibe no yowa kata ni putwo dasuki tori kake te moti yumapari tukape matur e ru

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎神主祝部等受賜弖
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo kamunusi papuri ra uke tamapari te
